topic: RevDeck TUI product iteration based on RevDeck.txt

features.title: Project Ingest And Index
features.summary: Create/open projects and import binary artifacts into a persistent SQLite-backed object model.

features.title: Terminal Workspace Shell
features.summary: Provide the three-pane TUI with workspace navigation, active lens, inspector, status line, and command bar.

features.title: Function Radar
features.summary: Rank functions by high-value reverse engineering signals and show explainable scoring reasons.

features.title: Universal Object Navigation
features.summary: Jump between related strings, xrefs, functions, imports, notes, findings, and evidence objects.

features.title: Analysis Memory
features.summary: Persist notes, tags, renames, statuses, TODOs, hypotheses, and evidence links on any object.

features.title: Findings And Report Export
features.summary: Promote evidence-linked analysis into structured findings and export Markdown/JSON reports first.

features.title: Graph Lab Seed
features.summary: Add local graph/path navigation for xrefs, call graph, simple CFG, and source-to-sink sketches.

features.title: External Tool Adapter Boundary
features.summary: Define importer/analyzer contracts for external reverse engineering and forensic tool outputs.

resolved_conflicts: Broad Lab vision is roadmap; v0.1 execution is Binary Triage.
Core schema and project DB are product-owned; external tools enter through adapters.
Graph Lab starts with local navigation rather than global terminal graph rendering.
unresolved_items: Select exact Rust crates for parsing, disassembly, TUI, and graph storage during implementation planning.
Validate function-boundary accuracy against fixture binaries.
